title: ThingsBoard Device
description: JSON Schema for ThingsBoard Device entity, derived from the public ThingsBoard OpenAPI 4.3.

id.description: JSON object with the Device Id. Specify this field to update the Device. Referencing non-existing Device Id will cause error. Omit this field to create new Device.

createdTime.description: Timestamp of the device creation, in milliseconds

tenantId.description: JSON object with Tenant Id. Use 'assignDeviceToTenant' to change the Tenant Id.

customerId.description: JSON object with Customer Id. Use 'assignDeviceToCustomer' to change the Customer Id.

name.description: Unique Device Name in scope of Tenant

label.description: Label that may be used in widgets

deviceProfileId.description: JSON object with Device Profile Id.

firmwareId.description: JSON object with Ota Package Id.

softwareId.description: JSON object with Ota Package Id.

deviceData.description: JSON object with content specific to type of transport in the device profile.
